_meta.name: living-surface-registry
_meta.purpose: Authoritative catalog of LIVE surfaces (funnel boards · deployed routes · portal modules · api endpoints). The SOURCE for the SCOPE-005.1 live-surface prior-art sweep (AUDITOR_DOCTRINE §5 / doctrine #22). A disco-sub greps entries by domain_tags ∩ scope-keywords + cites matches (and their URLs) in its Prior-Art block; if a build overlaps a live surface, it EXTENDS — never rebuilds.
_meta.record_shape: { surface, kind: funnel-board|deployed-route|portal-module|api-endpoint, url, owner_warrior, domain_tags:[], status: live|wip, verified_at: ISO-date, notes }
_meta.verify_rule: verified_at = the date the surface was last CONFIRMED live (curl/authed/render). The registry must be live-verified, not stale-asserted (verify-the-live-reality applies to the registry itself).
_meta.seed_version: v1 (2026-06-17) — KAGAMI one-time class-finder seed. NEXT (follow-up): auto-refresh so entries can't silently rot.
